TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_miladlad_tu_udip, title = miladlad_tu_udip, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/miladlad_tu_udip} }

S.FORM: ? makatukuh i lalud, akya maidih kisu amiladlad tu udip pakakapah tu ulad, nika yadah ku sasaungayen naku, nai ku lawad aku tu miladlad. amana kayadah ku nisimsim, sakamu saťĀčŚčēÁĒüÁźÜŚįąŚģ∂ciŚĖ¨ÁôĽtu demidemiad pituway a sasulidan miladlad tu udip, tu demiad minanam acaay kayadah ku nipinanam anika amalucek ku nipiladlad tu udip. "(Johnson & Johnson Official 7 Minute Workout) , ciŚĖ¨ÁôĽmipadang tuŚ¨ĆÁĒüŚÖ¨ŚŹłpituway a sasulidan nipiladlad tu udip, hanipiladlad han tu udip, sapica ku baketay a sapiladlad, patelatela han nu katuuday. sakamu sa ciŚĖ¨ÁôĽ cacay a lipayen u nipiladlad tulu a demiad katukuh lima a demiad nipiladlad tu udip. namakayniyay i nipiladlad tu udip, pituway a sasulidan nipiladlad tu udip malecad tu pangkyuway a demiad makabatikal atu baketay a nipiladald, nika amana kakasic amiladlad tu udip. ciŚĖ¨ÁôĽu sikawaway a tamdaw sa idau ku limaay a demiad anipatahkal tu sapiladlad tu udip. . sapakacacay:makabatikal atu miladlad tu lima. . sapakatusa:miÁĎúšľĹatu miladlad tu kuku`. . sapakatulu:maduba` atu miladlad tu ipabaway nu udip. ŚĎ®Śõõ:šľĎśĀĮ. sapakasepat:pipahanhanan a demiad . sapakalima:miladlad tu ipabaway nu udip atu isasaay nu udip. payawan uy canan ku ladladen, amanan kakasic sakapahay sa tu demidemiad malecaday tu ladladen, sakamu sa ciŚĖ¨ÁôĽanu idau ku nanam nu misu payawan i sananal, i kalahokan atu i kalabiyan amiladlad tu udip u kapahay amin.
S.PHON: ? makatukuńß i r~…ĺar~…ĺud, akja maidińß kisu amir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip pakakapańß tu ur~…ĺad, nika jadańß ku sasauŇčaj…ôn naku, nai ku r~…ĺawad aku tu mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad. amana kajadańß ku nisimsim, sakamu sa****** ¶i**tu d…ômid…ômiad pituwaj a sasur~…ĺidan mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip, tu d…ômiad minanam a ¶aaj kajadańß ku nipinanam anika amar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip. "(*ońßnson & *ońßnson offi ¶iar~…ĺ * minut…ô workout) , ¶i**mipadaŇč tu****pituwaj a sasur~…ĺidan nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip, ńßanipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad ńßan tu udip, sapi ¶a ku bak…ôtaj a sapir~…ĺadr~…ĺad, pat…ôr~…ĺat…ôr~…ĺa ńßan nu katuudaj. sakamu sa ¶i** ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺipaj…ôn u nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tur~…ĺu a d…ômiad katukuńß r~…ĺima a d…ômiad nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip. namakajnijaj i nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip, pituwaj a sasur~…ĺidan nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu paŇčkjuwaj a d…ômiad makabatikar~…ĺ atu bak…ôtaj a nipir~…ĺadar~…ĺd, nika amana kakasi ¶ amir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip. ¶i**u sikawawaj a tamdaw sa idau ku r~…ĺimaaj a d…ômiad anipatańßkar~…ĺ tu sapir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip. . sapaka ¶a ¶aj:makabatikar~…ĺ atu mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu r~…ĺima. . sapakatusa:mi**atu mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu kuku`. . sapakatur~…ĺu:maduba` atu mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu ipabawaj nu udip. **:**. sapakas…ôpat:pipańßanńßanan a d…ômiad . sapakar~…ĺima:mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu ipabawaj nu udip atu isasaaj nu udip. pajawan uj ¶anan ku r~…ĺadr~…ĺad…ôn, amanan kakasi ¶ sakapańßaj sa tu d…ômid…ômiad mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu r~…ĺadr~…ĺad…ôn, sakamu sa ¶i**anu idau ku nanam nu misu pajawan i sananar~…ĺ, i kar~…ĺańßokan atu i kar~…ĺabijan amir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip u kapańßaj amin.
S.FORM: ? makatukuh i lalud, akya maidih kisu amiladlad tu udip pakakapah tu ulad, nika yadah ku sasaungayen naku, nai ku lawad aku tu miladlad. amana kayadah ku nisimsim, sakamu saťĀčŚčēÁĒüÁźÜŚįąŚģ∂ciŚĖ¨ÁôĽtu demidemiad pituway a sasulidan miladlad tu udip, tu demiad minanam acaay kayadah ku nipinanam anika amalucek ku nipiladlad tu udip. "(Johnson & Johnson Official 7 Minute Workout) , ciŚĖ¨ÁôĽmipadang tuŚ¨ĆÁĒüŚÖ¨ŚŹłpituway a sasulidan nipiladlad tu udip, hanipiladlad han tu udip, sapica ku baketay a sapiladlad, patelatela han nu katuuday. sakamu sa ciŚĖ¨ÁôĽ cacay a lipayen u nipiladlad tulu a demiad katukuh lima a demiad nipiladlad tu udip. namakayniyay i nipiladlad tu udip, pituway a sasulidan nipiladlad tu udip malecad tu pangkyuway a demiad makabatikal atu baketay a nipiladald, nika amana kakasic amiladlad tu udip. ciŚĖ¨ÁôĽu sikawaway a tamdaw sa idau ku limaay a demiad anipatahkal tu sapiladlad tu udip. . sapakacacay:makabatikal atu miladlad tu lima. . sapakatusa:miÁĎúšľĹatu miladlad tu kuku`. . sapakatulu:maduba` atu miladlad tu ipabaway nu udip. ŚĎ®Śõõ:šľĎśĀĮ. sapakasepat:pipahanhanan a demiad . sapakalima:miladlad tu ipabaway nu udip atu isasaay nu udip. payawan uy canan ku ladladen, amanan kakasic sakapahay sa tu demidemiad malecaday tu ladladen, sakamu sa ciŚĖ¨ÁôĽanu idau ku nanam nu misu payawan i sananal, i kalahokan atu i kalabiyan amiladlad tu udip u kapahay amin.
S.PHON: ? makatukuńß i r~…ĺar~…ĺud, akja maidińß kisu amir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip pakakapańß tu ur~…ĺad, nika jadańß ku sasauŇčaj…ôn naku, nai ku r~…ĺawad aku tu mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad. amana kajadańß ku nisimsim, sakamu sa****** ¶i**tu d…ômid…ômiad pituwaj a sasur~…ĺidan mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip, tu d…ômiad minanam a ¶aaj kajadańß ku nipinanam anika amar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip. "(*ońßnson & *ońßnson offi ¶iar~…ĺ * minut…ô workout) , ¶i**mipadaŇč tu****pituwaj a sasur~…ĺidan nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip, ńßanipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad ńßan tu udip, sapi ¶a ku bak…ôtaj a sapir~…ĺadr~…ĺad, pat…ôr~…ĺat…ôr~…ĺa ńßan nu katuudaj. sakamu sa ¶i** ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺipaj…ôn u nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tur~…ĺu a d…ômiad katukuńß r~…ĺima a d…ômiad nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip. namakajnijaj i nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip, pituwaj a sasur~…ĺidan nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu paŇčkjuwaj a d…ômiad makabatikar~…ĺ atu bak…ôtaj a nipir~…ĺadar~…ĺd, nika amana kakasi ¶ amir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip. ¶i**u sikawawaj a tamdaw sa idau ku r~…ĺimaaj a d…ômiad anipatańßkar~…ĺ tu sapir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip. . sapaka ¶a ¶aj:makabatikar~…ĺ atu mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu r~…ĺima. . sapakatusa:mi**atu mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu kuku`. . sapakatur~…ĺu:maduba` atu mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu ipabawaj nu udip. **:**. sapakas…ôpat:pipańßanńßanan a d…ômiad . sapakar~…ĺima:mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu ipabawaj nu udip atu isasaaj nu udip. pajawan uj ¶anan ku r~…ĺadr~…ĺad…ôn, amanan kakasi ¶ sakapańßaj sa tu d…ômid…ômiad mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu r~…ĺadr~…ĺad…ôn, sakamu sa ¶i**anu idau ku nanam nu misu pajawan i sananar~…ĺ, i kar~…ĺańßokan atu i kar~…ĺabijan amir~…ĺadr~…ĺad tu udip u kapańßaj amin.
